positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial botanical wreath design. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, featuring glowing wildflowers, intricate constellation lines, crescent moons, and stylized deep forest leaves. Style should be a fusion of neo-traditional tattoo art and delicate vintage etching illustration. Use a limited, elegant color palette: deep indigo, sapphire blue, antique gold, and muted magenta. The overall feel must be high contrast, clean silhouette, and suitable for single-color screen printing or vector illustration for apparel. Minimal gradients, maximizing clear, solid shapes.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low contrast, noisy, cartoon, sketch, realism, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, jpeg artifacts, messy background
